metadata.seed: Yeah, I just feel like you're the only one that can help me, you know, I mean, my boyfriend, like, things aren't going well with him. I thought he could help me, but I guess he can't. And I think he's running around on me and all that. So I was just like, well, let me reach out to doctor Grande and see if it can help me, because it seems like my last resort.

patient.query: Yeah, I guess I just feel really anxious about everything. He’s been acting a bit distant lately, and I can’t help but worry he’s losing interest or maybe even seeing someone else. It’s like this knot in my stomach that just won’t go away. I want to trust him, but… I keep second-guessing everything.

he's seeing someone else
I can't trust him

I know I shouldn’t compare this relationship to those, but it’s like a reflex at this point. It makes me feel so vulnerable, and I don’t like it.

It makes me feel like I have to be on guard all the time. It’s tough to not think, “What if this is happening again?” I just don’t want to be hurt like that again, and it feels like I’m always walking on eggshells.
